subject: Make AI content agent category-aware
description: Update tools/content_agent.py to be category-aware — the system prompt should adapt based on product category (phone, auto, laptop, TV, etc.) instead of always saying 'You are a mobile phone reviewer'. Regenerate AI reviews for non-phone products that currently say 'this is not a phone'. Add support for generating category-specific pros/cons.
activeForm: Upgrading content agent for all categories
